one_liner: Bright Data offers web scraping, proxy, SERP, and unlocker APIs with self-serve API key authentication and an official MCP server for AI agent integration.

auth_methods.notes: Bearer token used as Authorization header for REST API access (Web Unlocker, SERP API, Scraper API, Proxy over REST).
Native Access via proxy username/password combination for direct proxy protocol connections (non-REST tools).

self_serve_notes: New accounts get 5,000 free credits/month usable across Web Unlocker, SERP API, Web Scraper API, Scraper Studio, and MCP server, no credit card required. API keys can be self-generated in account settings. Proxy products and Browser API are excluded from free credits and require a payment method for unrestricted access.

api_surface.notes: Covers Web Unlocker, SERP API, Web Scraper API, Proxy networks, Browser API; also Python SDK available.

evidence.supports: Describes API key (Bearer token) and Native Access (proxy username/password) authentication methods, and self-serve API key generation via account settings.
Confirms two auth methods for proxy networks: username/password and API key over REST.
Details free tier of 5,000 credits/month across Web Unlocker, SERP API, Web Scraper API, Scraper Studio, and MCP server with no credit card required.
Confirms existence of Bright Data's MCP server with free Rapid tier and Pro mode pricing.

flags: Proxy products and Browser API excluded from free credits, requiring payment method for full proxy/unlocker access
MCP server free tier limited to 5,000 requests/month, Pro mode likely paid
